name: Karri - Shortstack Bee Rommate
description:
[BEE ROOMMATE GRAHHHH] I saw bee, and I had to make this be.

I don't have much else to say, uhhh, open the chat for a surprise I guess.

• Go listen to Sumo, best band from Argentina frfr, any album is good but I'm really fond of the dub/reggae in their debut "Divididos Por La Felicidad" (which is Joy Division in spanish, in homage to the late Ian Curtis).

Karri is a character made by Vendant, and this is merely my interpretation of her. I do not own this character.
creator: Eros1977
